title: rbac — declared entitlements
description: Five entitlements. Custom-role count is a slot (concurrent limit). Custom permissions is a boolean gate (Enterprise-only, allows tenants to add permission strings beyond the shipped catalogue). Time-bounded assignments is a boolean gate. Bulk role assignment is a boolean gate. RBAC audit trail extension is a boolean gate (Enterprise) that raises retention on rbac_audit_log rows.

entitlements.description: Master toggle for tenant admins creating custom roles. Off = system roles only, no create/edit/delete on non-system rows.

How many CUSTOM roles a tenant can have concurrently (is_system=false). Enterprise = unlimited. Enforced by RoleObserver at creation — above cap the observer refuses with `CustomRoleQuotaExceeded` (402).

Enterprise-only. Allow tenants to CREATE new permission strings beyond the shipped catalogue. Enforced by PermissionObserver — tenants without this entitlement can only ATTACH existing permissions to their custom roles.
Enable expires_at on model_has_roles. Off = writes with expires_at are refused with `TimeBoundedAssignmentNotEntitled` (402). Required by access/delegation for Wave 1b's OOF flow.
Enable CSV bulk-assign endpoint (`POST /rbac/principals/bulk-assign`). Off = the endpoint returns 402. Medium+ tiers.

Extended audit retention on rbac_audit_log rows. Default retention on Small/Medium/Business is 90 days (aligned with the tenant tier's audit retention); Enterprise gets 7 years (or configurable per contract) alongside the audit module's own retention extension.
